title: Mastercard pilots agentic transactions in Malaysia
snippet: Mastercard today announced the completion of a pilot that delivered its first authenticated agentic transactions in Malaysia, marking a major step forward for trusted AI‑powered commerce.

title: Pakistan parliament passes Virtual Assets Act formalizing crypto regulatory authority
message_html: Pakistan parliament passes Virtual Assets Act formalizing crypto regulatory authority ...
snippet: Pakistan passed the Virtual Assets Act, establishing a statutory digital asset regulator and introducing criminal penalties nationwide.

title: Elizabeth Warren blasts SEC over Justin Sun case, warns crypto bills must address Trump's 'crypto corruption'
message_html: Elizabeth Warren blasts SEC over Justin Sun case, warns crypto bills must address Trump's 'crypto corruption' ...
snippet: Sen. Warren slammed the SEC’s decision to drop its case against Tron founder Justin Sun after charges were dropped in a $10 million deal.

title: Ondo Finance RWAs on 1inch surpass $2.5 billion in volume since September 2025
message_html: Ondo Finance RWAs on 1inch surpass $2.5 billion in volume since September 2025 ...
snippet: 1inch (@1inch): 🔁 @OndoFinance RWAs on 1inch surpassed $2.5 billion in volume since September 2025. Tokenized Nvidia, Tesla, and Google stocks and commodity-linked tokens (Silver) now traded on-chain through DeFi infrastructure. BNB Chain leads in volume, transactions, and active users.
